레위기 11:1.content: Yahweh spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying to them,

레위기 11:2.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, saying, ‘These are the living things which you may eat among all the animals that are on the earth.

레위기 11:3.content: Whatever parts the hoof, and is cloven-footed, and chews the cud among the animals, that you may eat.

레위기 11:4.content: “ ‘Nevertheless these you shall not eat of those that chew the cud, or of those who part the hoof: the camel, because it chews the cud but doesn’t have a parted hoof, is unclean to you.

레위기 11:5.content: The hyrax, because it chews the cud but doesn’t have a parted hoof, is unclean to you.

레위기 11:6.content: The hare, because it chews the cud but doesn’t have a parted hoof, is unclean to you.

레위기 11:7.content: The pig, because it has a split hoof, and is cloven-footed, but doesn’t chew the cud, is unclean to you.

레위기 11:8.content: You shall not eat their meat. You shall not touch their carcasses. They are unclean to you.

레위기 11:9.content: “ ‘These you may eat of all that are in the waters: whatever has fins and scales in the waters, in the seas, and in the rivers, that you may eat.

레위기 11:10.content: All that don’t have fins and scales in the seas and rivers, all that move in the waters, and all the living creatures that are in the waters, they are an abomination to you,

레위기 11:11.content: and you shall detest them. You shall not eat of their meat, and you shall detest their carcasses.

레위기 11:12.content: Whatever has no fins nor scales in the waters is an abomination to you.

레위기 11:13.content: “ ‘You shall detest these among the birds; they shall not be eaten because they are an abomination: the eagle, the vulture, the black vulture,

레위기 11:14.content: the red kite, any kind of black kite,

레위기 11:16.content: the horned owl, the screech owl, the gull, any kind of hawk,

레위기 11:17.content: the little owl, the cormorant, the great owl,

레위기 11:18.content: the white owl, the desert owl, the osprey,

레위기 11:19.content: the stork, any kind of heron, the hoopoe, and the bat.

레위기 11:20.content: “ ‘All flying insects that walk on all fours are an abomination to you.

레위기 11:21.content: Yet you may eat these: of all winged creeping things that go on all fours, which have long, jointed legs for hopping on the earth.

레위기 11:22.content: Even of these you may eat: any kind of locust, any kind of katydid, any kind of cricket, and any kind of grasshopper.

레위기 11:23.content: But all winged creeping things which have four feet are an abomination to you.

레위기 11:24.content: “ ‘By these you will become unclean: whoever touches their carcass shall be unclean until the evening.

레위기 11:25.content: Whoever carries any part of their carcass shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the evening.

레위기 11:26.content: “ ‘Every animal which has a split hoof that isn’t completely divided, or doesn’t chew the cud, is unclean to you. Everyone who touches them shall be unclean.

레위기 11:27.content: Whatever goes on its paws, among all animals that go on all fours, they are unclean to you. Whoever touches their carcass shall be unclean until the evening.

레위기 11:28.content: He who carries their carcass shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the evening. They are unclean to you.

레위기 11:29.content: “ ‘These are they which are unclean to you among the creeping things that creep on the earth: the weasel, the rat, any kind of great lizard,

레위기 11:30.content: the gecko, and the monitor lizard, the wall lizard, the skink, and the chameleon.

레위기 11:31.content: These are they which are unclean to you among all that creep. Whoever touches them when they are dead shall be unclean until the evening.

레위기 11:32.content: Anything they fall on when they are dead shall be unclean; whether it is any vessel of wood, or clothing, or skin, or sack, whatever vessel it is, with which any work is done, it must be put into water, and it shall be unclean until the evening. Then it will be clean.

레위기 11:33.content: Every earthen vessel into which any of them falls and all that is in it shall be unclean. You shall break it.

레위기 11:34.content: All food which may be eaten which is soaked in water shall be unclean. All drink that may be drunk in every such vessel shall be unclean.

레위기 11:35.content: Everything whereupon part of their carcass falls shall be unclean; whether oven, or range for pots, it shall be broken in pieces. They are unclean, and shall be unclean to you.

레위기 11:36.content: Nevertheless a spring or a cistern in which water is gathered shall be clean, but that which touches their carcass shall be unclean.

레위기 11:37.content: If part of their carcass falls on any sowing seed which is to be sown, it is clean.

레위기 11:38.content: But if water is put on the seed, and part of their carcass falls on it, it is unclean to you.

레위기 11:39.content: “ ‘If any animal of which you may eat dies, he who touches its carcass shall be unclean until the evening.

레위기 11:40.content: He who eats of its carcass shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the evening. He also who carries its carcass shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the evening.

레위기 11:41.content: “ ‘Every creeping thing that creeps on the earth is an abomination. It shall not be eaten.

레위기 11:42.content: Whatever goes on its belly, and whatever goes on all fours, or whatever has many feet, even all creeping things that creep on the earth, them you shall not eat; for they are an abomination.

레위기 11:43.content: You shall not make yourselves abominable with any creeping thing that creeps. You shall not make yourselves unclean with them, that you should be defiled by them.

레위기 11:44.content: For I am Yahweh your God. Sanctify yourselves therefore, and be holy; for I am holy. You shall not defile yourselves with any kind of creeping thing that moves on the earth.

레위기 11:45.content: For I am Yahweh who brought you up out of the land of Egypt, to be your God. You shall therefore be holy, for I am holy.

레위기 11:46.content: “ ‘This is the law of the animal, and of the bird, and of every living creature that moves in the waters, and of every creature that creeps on the earth,

레위기 11:47.content: to make a distinction between the unclean and the clean, and between the living thing that may be eaten and the living thing that may not be eaten.’ ”
